{{nihongo|'''Karakunino- Shrine'''|韓国宇豆峯神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōsumi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Karakunino- Shrine'''|韓国宇豆峯神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōsumi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Karakunino- Shrine'''|韓国宇豆峯神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōsumi Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

{{nihongo|'''Karakunino- Shrine'''|韓国宇豆峯神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōsumi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Karakunino- Shrine'''|韓国宇豆峯神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōsumi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Karakunino- Shrine'''|韓国宇豆峯神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōsumi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Karakunino- Shrine'''|韓国宇豆峯神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōsumi Province]].
